text: I feel a sense of spacious sterility in the first room, as if waiting for purpose or presence to animate its emptiness. The quiet and order prompt contemplation but also a slight unease at the vacancy. In the second space, surrounded by vibrant colors and symbols of inquiry—R+D—I am awakened by curiosity and an undercurrent of anticipation. The contrast between emptiness and the invitation to explore ideas unsettles yet intrigues me, as if I am drifting between worlds of preparation and possibility.
